title.en: Regarding the invitation of the border lord, Ye...

content.en:
Regarding the invitation of the border lord, Ye Tian was a little curious.

"Where? If it's a chance, I'm very interested. "

Ye Tian said.

Immediately, the border lord said in detail: "In the Void Region, there are many special places, even if they are peak Legendary Realm lords, it is difficult to find. The place I found was named by me as the Origin Realm, and I have fallen hundreds of clones in the Origin Realm before and after, and the losses are great, but the harvest is not bad I dare not invite the peak Legendary Realm Lord of the fourth level, because I can't beat the other party, if I find an amazing opportunity, I am afraid that I will not be able to get it, and your strength is comparable to mine, so I will invite you. "

"Border Lord, you have fallen hundreds of clones, and this time you suddenly invited me, could it be that there is any trouble, you can't solve it alone?"

"It's true that I've run into big trouble during the exploration process, and I can't solve it myself, even if I send all the clones, it's still a little worse, so I want to invite you to participate. But you need to make a vow that if there is a gain,16 we must share it together, so that I will take you there. "The Frontier Lord said.

"Okay, I agree!"

Ye Tianying said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian made an oath.

In fact, it is difficult for the oath to bind the peak legendary realm lord, but if you want to attack the eternal master, you will be entangled in cause and effect, and you will not want to be contaminated with cause and effect, so you will not dare to break the oath.

"Endless Lord, let's go, let's go to the Beginning. "

Frontier Lord's Road.

......

Void area, somewhere.

The two figures tore through the void together and descended here.

As soon as he came here, Ye Tian sensed the surroundings and immediately realized that something was wrong.

"The Endless Lord has noticed that something is wrong, right?

The Frontier Lord said.

In fact, any Peak Legendary Realm Lord would find that something was wrong here.

However, this place is very remote, and the Void Zone is too big to want to go to any corner of the Void Zone.

Therefore, it is naturally not easy to find here

"Something is wrong here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The normal space-time of the Void Zone is a little different from here, and it seems that there is a space-time aura that is not under the jurisdiction of the Void Zone, the Long River of Time and the Kukai.

Therefore, there must be an area here that releases different space-time breaths, and the Origin Realm is the source of the strange space-time breath, a place that is not governed by the long river of time and the sea of space.

Soon.

Ye Tian locked the approximate position of the starting realm

"That's it, I'll take you there, or we'll have to waste a long time exploring. "

Frontier Lord's Road.

"Okay!" Ye Tian didn't want to waste time, so he followed the border lord through layers of time and space, and arrived at a very special time and space area.

And here, a very large realm phantom covers this area.

Ye Tian and the Border Lord stood outside the realm, their eyes wanted to peek into this origin realm, but they couldn't see anything.

"All the rules here originate from this special world, which is why I call it the Beginning. "

"Let me talk about the situation I know first, how big the Origin Realm is, I don't know, once you enter the Origin Boundary, you will encounter the attack of some strange creatures, these strange creatures are very weak, don't care, there are few powerful ones. But if you want to reap the benefits, you will face some dangers. Now, some opportunities in the periphery have been taken away by me, and there is no need to say it. At present, the trouble I encounter is a strange tree, this tree has wisdom, and its strength is still very strong, although it has not reached the fourth level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord, but the gap is not very large, it will not move, but once it enters its territory, it will be attacked by it. But it blocked its way, and if you didn't pass through the area where it was, you couldn't go deep into the depths of the Origin Realm, and I tried from other directions, but it didn't work, and in the Origin Boundary, there was no direction, and no matter how you shuttled it, you would encounter that strange tree.

"Such a strange tree!"

Ye Tian was also a little curious.

The Frontier Lord also tried to act together with three clones, but failed, and he only had three clones.

He didn't dare to let the body come together, if the body also fell, then it really fell.

"Endless Lord, you're going to send a few clones over, if you pass through the area where the tree is located, you may have a big harvest in the future. The Frontier Lord said.

"You have three doppelgangers, and I have three doppelgangers, how?"

Ye Tian proposed.

"Yes!" the border lord agreed, six clones, even if one of us each passed, it would be considered a success. "

"Let's go!"

The border lord took Ye Tian into the Origin Realm

As soon as he entered the Origin Realm, Ye Tian sensed the strange creatures that existed in the void.

Immediately, he subconsciously used the talent of replication to probe the talent of these strange creatures, and he really detected it.

Race: Phantom Clan

Moreover, Ye Tian also found a lot of talents from these Phantom Clan bodies, most of which were very ordinary, but there was one talent that was not bad.

Legendary Ancestral Endowment: Void Escape

This was the first time Ye Tian had seen this kind of talent.

However, judging from the actions of these phantom clans, the void escape should be a variant of spatial talent, and it also involves blurring and so on.

Ye Tian noticed that in 1957, some phantom clans kept fleeing after the space was blurred, and there was no interval in the middle process, and it was difficult to perceive, this was the effect of void retreat.

If you use it to run away or chase down, or to neutralize other people's attacks, this talent is quite good.

What's more, Void Escape belongs to the Legendary-level Ancestral Endowment, if all of them are copied and fused, a Legendary-level Void Escape can be born, which is also of great help to Ye Tian.

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

"Copy!"

The Void Escape Talent was copied by Ye Tian, and after the copying, these Phantom Clans were useless to Ye Tian, if they dared to attack, they would be directly killed by Ye Tian and the Border Lord.

Buzz Buzz !!!

A large number of Phantom Clans were killed by them in an instant, turning into corpses.

In a short period of time, the border lord took Ye Tian across many areas, and there were many traces of battle on the way through, as well as the broken void, which were obviously the traces of the previous border lord's battle.

From these traces of the battle, we can see how tragic and dangerous the battle was in the first place.

If it weren't for that, the Border Lord's clone wouldn't have fallen so many times.

It didn't take long for the Frontier Lord to stop.

"It's here!"_
